name: mostMsgDecodeRLE
title: mostMsgDecodeRLE
syntax: long mostMsgDecodeRLE(mostAmsMessage * msg, long fktIds[], long buffersize)
description: mostMsgDecodeRLE() decodes the data area of a message and saves the function IDs in a list. Run Length Encoding in accordance with MOST Specification 2.4 Para. 2.3.9 is used. This function is suitable for evaluating messages of the FBlock.FktIds.Status type.
return: >=0: Number of valid function IDs in fktIds[]
